description: Renovate config for RenQuant umbrella (#108 S14): auto pin-bump PRs for subrepos.lock.json. Deploy by copying to RenQuant/renovate.json and enabling the Renovate GitHub App on the org.

customManagers.description: Each subrepo entry: remote URL + pinned commit. Renovate tracks the repo's main branch digest and opens a PR when it moves.

prBodyNotes: Auto pin-bump. MERGE RULES: (1) wait for the umbrella compat-matrix CI (coupled-change contracts) to pass; (2) a human or codex merges per SOP — never auto-merge; (3) after merge, the run machine still needs `make subrepo-runtime-root` (merged-is-not-deployed).
